sentences.arabic: كَانَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ يُحِبُّ مُسَاعَدَةَ جِيرَانِهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Ibrahim je uvijek volio pomagati komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: Ibrahim always loved helping his neighbors.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ رَأَى عَجُوزًا تَحْمِلُ أَكْيَاسًا ثَقِيلَةً.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je vidio staricu kako nosi teške vrećice.
sentences.translationEn: One day he saw an old woman carrying heavy bags.

sentences.arabic: رَكَضَ إِلَيْهَا وَحَمَلَ الأَكْيَاسَ حَتَّى بَابِ بَيْتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Potrčao je k njoj i nosio vrećice do njenih kućnih vrata.
sentences.translationEn: He ran to her and carried the bags to her door.

sentences.translation: Starica mu se zahvalila i poželjela mu dobro.
sentences.translationEn: The old woman thanked him and wished him well.
